title: AKH® Happy Easter Bunting | 2M | Happy Easter Banner with Printed Card Decorations | Cute Bunny Garland for Easter Party, Spring Decor & Home Celebrations
features: Dimensions & Material – This Easter bunting garland measures approximately 2 meters in length and features high-quality, durable printed card decorations. The lightweight design ensures easy hanging and reusability.
Charming Easter-Themed Design – Featuring adorable 14 cutouts in soft pastel colours, this Happy Easter banner adds a festive touch to your home, garden, or party space.
Easy to Hang & Reusable – Comes pre-threaded for hassle-free decorating. Simply hang it across walls, doorways, mantelpieces, or tables to create a festive Easter atmosphere.
Perfect for Easter Celebrations – Ideal for Easter egg hunts, spring parties, family gatherings, and classroom decorations. A fun and festive way to bring Easter cheer to any space.

Great Gift & Decoration Piece – This bunny bunting makes a thoughtful gift for craft lovers and party planners. Reusable for multiple celebrations, it’s an eco-friendly and stylish choice for Easter décor.
description: Celebrate Easter in style with this charming Easter Bunny Bunting! Spanning 2 meters, this vibrant garland features adorable bunny cutouts in soft pastel hues, perfect for adding a festive touch to any space. Made from high-quality printed card, it’s lightweight, durable, and easy to hang across walls, doorways, or tables. Ideal for Easter parties, spring celebrations, and family gatherings, this bunting creates a joyful atmosphere wherever it’s displayed. Whether for your home, garden, or classroom, it’s the perfect way to bring Easter cheer and make lasting memories with loved ones.
